title: stellaria heterantha
intro: Stellaria heterantha, also known as the Himalayan starwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stellaria heterantha include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The herbal preparations of Stellaria heterantha include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
